quotes: Take oaths from all kings and magistrates at their installment, to do impartial justice by law.

defs: The seat in which one is placed.
quotes: The several chairs of order, look, you scour; . . . Each fair installment, coat, and several crest With loyal blazon, evermore be blest.

defs: A portion of a debt, or sum of money, which is divided into portions that are made payable at different times; that portion of a debt payed back in any one payment; as, the next installment is due January first. Payment by installment is payment by parts at different times, the amounts and times being often definitely stipulated.
a part of a broadcast serial.
a part of a published serial.
